title: Support - Help Guide
scenario: Help Guide link under Support in App Settings redirects to Poly Lens Mobile online help page, and Cancel (X) button dismisses help screen and returns to Support screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or the profile/gear icon to access App Settings.
4. Scroll down to the Support section.
6. Observe that the app redirects to the Poly Lens Mobile online help page.
7. Tap the Cancel (X) button on the help screen.
8. Observe that the help screen is dismissed and the user is returned to the Support screen.
expected: Tapping "Help Guide" redirects the user to the Poly Lens Mobile online help page. Tapping the Cancel (X) button dismisses the help screen and returns the user to the Support screen.
